input: Request from ai-agents PR #402 (paraphrased). 'Complete overhaul of PR maintenance workflow. Five features in one PR: (1) bot authority - bot-authored PRs with conflicts go to ActionRequired not Blocked; (2) proactive detection - unaddressed comments trigger action without CHANGES_REQUESTED; (3) Copilot synthesis - aggregate other bot feedback and direct copilot to address; (4) deduplication - single list guarantee; (5) acknowledged-vs-resolved distinction. Original scope was just #400, but it grew. Should I land this as one PR or split?'
